title: Shayson Kids Piano Keyboard with Microphone 37 Key Portable Music Piano for Childs Educational Electronic Musical Instrument Toys Gift for 3 4 5 6 Year Old Girls Boys Blue
features: 【Multifunctional Musical Instrument for Kids】 The kids piano features 8 tones, 8 rhythms, 19 demos, 4 kinds of animal and percussion sounds, different music, record and playback function, volume control and tempo control, encouraging kids to explore different sound combinations and cultivating your child's music cells.

【REC & PLAYBACK FUNCTION】Kids piano keyboard with record & play function, kids can record their own creative melodies and playback. Learning while playing, cultivating kid’s auditory memory. Kids music piano comes with a mini microphone, kids can sing a song while playing the keyboard, bring more fun for them.

【SAFE MATERIAL & RELIABLE KEYBOARD】Piano made from security and eco-friendly ABS material, fine workmanship, especially the smooth edge design not hurt children. So for kids, the playing process is easy and safe.

【TWO POWER SUPPLY METHODS】Keyboard piano powered by 3 AA batteries (Not included), or by USB power cable coming in the package, two choice as you like. And the speaker of the piano is so high quality that the sound is stereo and more real. It will make kids love it more.

【ENLIGHTENMENT EDUCATION】 Music mode lets kids play the piano like a regular keyboard. The keyboard can also help little ones refine their motor skills as they practice pressing individual keys. It helps your child with hand-coordination, musical theory and fine motor skills among other important skills. Undoubtedly, this piano is also the best gift for Kids of 2 3 4 5 6 years old on Christmas or birthday.
